mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role_permission (role_id, permission_id, create_by, create_time) VALUES (#{roleId}, #{permissionId}, #{createBy}, NOW())

INSERT INTO sys_role_permission (role_id, permission_id, create_by, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.roleId}, #{item.permissionId}, #{item.createBy}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_role_permission WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND permission_id = #{permissionId}
